name: Lawn Sign War
text:
Whenever you create one or more tokens, put a lawn-sign counter on Lawn Sign War.
Voters and Citizens you control get +0/+1 for each lawn-sign counter on Lawn Sign War. (Every yard on the block is committed now. It's escalating.)
flavorText: It started with one sign. Then a neighbor put up two. Now the cul-de-sac is visible from orbit.
